languages.text: "Конечно. Вы ж скоро нашим командиром станете, вот уж вам бы надо знать".
"Of course. You'll be our commander soon enough, so it's only right that you should know."
languages.original_text: "Конечно. Вы ж скоро нашим командиром станете, вот уж вам бы надо знать".

languages.text: "Natürlich. Ihr werdet schon bald unser Commander sein und solltet Bescheid wissen."
languages.original_text: "Of course. You'll be our commander soon enough, so it's only right that you should know."

traits.locale_text: "Natürlich. Ihr werdet schon bald unser Commander sein und solltet Bescheid wissen."

languages.text: « Bien sûr. Ce sont des informations qui vous seront utiles quand vous serez notre {mf|commandant|commandante}. »
languages.original_text: "Of course. You'll be our commander soon enough, so it's only right that you should know."

traits.locale_text: « Bien sûr. Ce sont des informations qui vous seront utiles quand vous serez notre {mf|commandant|commandante}. »

languages.text: “那当然。您很快就是我们正式的指挥官了，让您了解这些，也是理所应当的。”
languages.original_text: "Of course. You'll be our commander soon enough, so it's only right that you should know."

languages.text: 「おぬし様にお断りなどできぬ」
languages.original_text: "How could I say no to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
